# Smelloff

> Smelloff is a Hyderabad-based D2C men's grooming brand. Its first product, ODORSTRIKE, is a 50ml pocket-sized fabric-only odor eliminator mist — not a perfume, not a deodorant. It captures and neutralizes odor molecules on contact, works on cotton, denim, polyester, and wool, dries clear in under 10 seconds, and leaves no residue.

Smelloff believes people don't fear smelling bad — they fear others noticing. ODORSTRIKE is designed for re-wears, post-gym, travel, and humid Indian weather, where a deodorant stops working but the fabric still holds the smell.

## Product

- [ODORSTRIKE 50ml](https://www.smelloff.in/#buy): India's first pocket-sized fabric odor eliminator. 50ml mist, ₹159 launch / ₹179 standard. Free shipping above ₹299. COD available across India.

## Key facts

- Brand: Smelloff (master brand)
- Product: ODORSTRIKE (first product)
- Category: Fabric odor eliminator mist (not perfume, not deodorant, not skin product)
- Format: 50ml pocket-sized spray bottle
- Price: ₹159 launch price, ₹179 standard MRP (struck: ₹199)
- Origin: Made in Hyderabad, India
- Founder: Brainee (solo founder)
- Founded: 2026
- Tagline: Pocket-sized odor killer for your clothes — anytime, anywhere
- Positioning: People don't fear smelling bad — they fear others noticing it

## Formulation

ODORSTRIKE is built on a 7-ingredient fabric-safe formula:

- Water (73%) — base
- Isopropyl Alcohol (20%) — solvent, dries fast
- Triethyl Citrate (2.5%) — plant-derived odor carrier
- Zinc Ricinoleate (1.5%) — hero active that binds to odor molecules
- Fragrance (1.2%) — subtle, fades in under a minute
- Polysorbate 20 (1%) — emulsifier
- Phenoxyethanol & Ethylhexylglycerin (0.8%) — preservative

## When to use

- Post-gym, before a meeting or class, when changing isn't an option
- Denim and jackets you don't want to wash but can't re-wear
- Travel — one 50ml bottle covers four days, two shirts
- Monsoon humidity that makes fresh laundry smell musty
- Between dry-cleanings for suits, blazers, kurtas

## How to use

1. Hold the bottle 15cm from the fabric.
2. Spray 2–3 pumps per problem zone (collar, armpits, chest).
3. Wait 10 seconds. The mist dries clear, the smell is neutralized.

## What ODORSTRIKE is not

- Not a perfume — does not add scent, it removes odor
- Not a deodorant — never spray on skin, formulated for fabric only
- Not a detergent — does not clean fabric, only neutralizes odor
- Not safe on silk, leather, suede, or dry-clean-only materials
